title: Intensely Sweet Greek Honey Loukoumades
description: A traditional Greek dessert featuring crispy, sugar-coated loukoumades drizzled with intensely sweet honey, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe incorporates a robata-grill for a unique twist and is paleo-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together almond flour, coconut sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, vanilla extract, and lemon zest.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1 inch in diameter.
Fry the loukoumades for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the loukoumades from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Drizzle the loukoumades with intensely sweet honey and serve immediately.
For an added twist, grill the loukoumades on a robata-grill for 30 seconds to 1 minute, or until slightly charred.
Serve the loukoumades warm and enjoy.
